rows.label: tlk47400164_03_msg0001
rows.name:
The Divine Beast seems strange.
It seems more active than usual.

rows.label: tlk47400164_03_msg0002
rows.name:
The Divine Beasts of Liberalitas
Archipelago are extremely aggressive.

rows.label: tlk47400164_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Since they usually move in groups,
they don't travel far, but...

rows.label: tlk47400164_03_msg0004
rows.name:
If another Divine Beast comes near,
they may kill it with lightning
or tentacles.

rows.label: tlk47400164_03_msg0005
rows.name:
Please be very careful
when traveling.
